title: xantolis tomentosa var. elengoides
intro: Xantolis tomentosa var. elengoides, also known as Elengi, is a plant species that belongs to the family Sapotaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Elengi is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating skin conditions like eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
